# Eligibility criteria:
        # 1. Annual income below 15000
        # 2. Household size of 4 or more
        # 3. Age 60 or above
        # 4. Unemployed or retired
        # Applicant is eligible if they meet at least one of the criteria.
        return (self.annual_income < 15000 or 
                self.household_size >= 4 or 
                self.age >= 60 or 
                self.employment_status in ['unemployed', 'retired'])
